note:
`вҳ… Insight в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
- This output is the final "ego revision" stage of the learner-side deliberation loop documented in [model].md (`services/learnerTutorInteractionEngine.js`): initial ego вҶ’ superego critique вҶ’ ego revision вҶ’ external message. The ego has final authority, so the superego's notes about "spiraling" and "fragments instead of fully-formed second-order thoughts" get folded in, but the ego decides what survives.
- The persona's anxious-hedger profile and the scene's `ambient_pressure` stage-direction style constrain the output toward short clauses, self-repair, and displacement onto the officer's body language rather than direct inquiry into the stool itself вҖ” exactly the misconception structure the tutor will later have to crack.
`в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
